response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with ~15 years of production engineering, current hands-on work at Stripe on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, and solid TypeScript/cloud delivery experience — all directly relevant to the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his verifiable GenAI experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python, which are core required qualifications. He reads as an excellent engineer who is early in his AI specialization rather than the seasoned applied-GenAI practitioner the role specifies.
strengths: Current staff-level work at Stripe on MCP servers, AI-agent infrastructure, and agentic workflow frameworks
Deep production TypeScript/Node.js and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) across high-scale systems
Proven mentorship and stakeholder-facing skills via workshops, courses, conference talks, and consulting
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions (~1 year of evidenced GenAI work)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience on the resume
Python absent from skills and work history despite being a primary required language

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/GenAI experience depth (8+ yr requirement, no RAG/vector DB evidence)
Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at current staff role
Staff-level production engineering breadth with TypeScript, cloud, and mentoring
